sharedTemplate.bodyTemplate:
Hi there,
I recently came across {{businessName}} on Google and wanted to reach out with an idea.
When potential clients find {{businessTypeArticle}} online, they often want to quickly see {{clientNeeds}}. I thought {{businessName}} could benefit from having one central place where potential clients could learn more about your {{businessNoun}} and get a feel for your brand.
A professional website could give {{businessName}} a place to showcase {{showcaseWhat}}, and make it easier for potential clients to take the next step.
I'd be happy to create a free custom website demo designed specifically for {{businessName}}. You could take a look at it and see whether it feels like something that could be valuable for your business.
There's no cost or obligation. It would simply be a custom concept created specifically for your {{businessNoun}}.
If you'd like me to put one together, just reply to this email and let me know.

Regards,
Jeremy Reid
Web Management Specialist
Rapid Rank Agency  |  1-888-778-9724
rapidrankagency.com  |  rapidrankagency@gmail.com
